page_metadata.biotools__summary: A novel computational method and its R and web-based implementations, to perform inference of gene network from transcriptome data and prioritization of key genes with central functional and topological role in the network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A novel computational method and its R and web-based implementations, to perform inference of gene network from transcriptome data and prioritization of key genes with central functional and topological role in the network.
